data.name: AppSubtitle
data.value: Unified library · installed and cloud games

data.name: SteamLocalLibraryStatus
data.value: Automatic · local Steam library. Connect API key for your full library.

data.name: UbisoftCacheMissing
data.value: Ubisoft Connect library cache not found. Open Ubisoft Connect and sign in at least once.

data.name: LegendaryPromptIntro
data.value: OpenGameHUB manages the Epic library helper automatically (no Python required). Sign in once to list your owned Epic games and install them from here.

data.name: LegendaryPromptAuth
data.value: Click the button below to open Epic sign-in. After completing it, refresh your library here.

data.name: EaCloudLogHint
data.value: · EA library via EA app logs

data.name: EaCacheMissing
data.value: EA app library cache not found. Open the EA app and sign in at least once.

data.name: EaCacheDecryptFailed
data.value: Could not read the EA app library cache. Open the EA app, sign in, and try again. If the problem persists, repair the EA app from Windows Settings.

data.name: EaAppNotInstalled
data.value: The EA app is not installed on this PC.

data.name: WaitingEaAppLaunch
data.value: Waiting for EA app to open...

data.name: WaitingEaLibrarySync
data.value: Waiting for EA app library sync...

data.name: EaLibraryPromptTitle
data.value: EA library cache could not be read

data.name: EaLibraryPromptIntro
data.value: The EA app stores your owned games in an encrypted local cache tied to this PC's hardware. OpenGameHUB could not decrypt it, so your uninstalled EA games may be missing or incomplete.

data.name: EaLibraryPromptWhy
data.value: Open the EA app, sign in, and wait until your library finishes syncing. That usually rewrites the cache with the correct key for this PC. If it still fails, repair the EA app from Windows Settings → Apps.

data.name: EaLibraryPromptFallbackTitle
data.value: What we can do right now

data.name: EaLibraryPromptFallback
data.value: We found games from recent EA app logs on this PC. This list may be incomplete or outdated until the cache can be read again.

data.name: EaLibraryPromptRepair
data.value: Only your installed EA games will appear until the EA app syncs successfully. Open the EA app first, then refresh your library here.

data.name: EpicLauncherInstallStarted
data.value: Epic Games Launcher opened to install {0}. Refresh your library when it finishes.

data.name: EpicLauncherInstallIntro
data.value: Opening Epic Games Launcher. Complete the installation there so you can manage and uninstall the game normally.

data.name: EpicLauncherInstallWaiting
data.value: Waiting for Epic Games Launcher to finish installing...

data.name: EpicLauncherInstallDetected
data.value: Game installed via Epic Games Launcher.

data.name: EpicLauncherInstallBackground
data.value: Installation continues in Epic Games Launcher. Refresh your library when it finishes.

data.name: EpicInstallUrlMissing
data.value: This Epic game cannot be installed because its store identifiers are missing.

data.name: EpicInstallLaunchFailed
data.value: Could not open Epic Games Launcher.

data.name: EpicInstallComplete
data.value: Installation complete. Synced with Epic Games Launcher.

data.name: EpicInstallNotVerified
data.value: Legendary finished but "{0}" was not found in the installed games list.

data.name: SettingsDescription
data.value: Configure optional integrations. Installed games are detected without an API.

data.name: SteamApiHelp
data.value: Get your key at steamcommunity.com/dev/apikey and your SteamID64 at steamid.io

data.name: SteamSetupDescription
data.value: Optional: connect your full Steam library via Web API. We already read your local library automatically — this adds games you own but Steam has never synced to this PC.

data.name: SteamSetupStepAccountHelp
data.value: Detected from your local Steam installation. Sign in to the Steam client first if detection fails.

data.name: SteamSetupApiKeyReady
data.value: Account detected. Read the instructions in step 2, then open the API key page when you are ready.

data.name: SteamSetupAccountNotFound
data.value: Could not read your Steam account. Open Steam, sign in, then try again.

data.name: SteamSetupSteamNotInstalled
data.value: Steam is not installed on this PC.

data.name: SteamSetupStepApiKeyHelp
data.value: Click the button below, sign in to Steam, and create a key. Use any domain (e.g. localhost). Then paste the key here.

data.name: SteamSetupApiKeyInstructions
data.value: Paste the API key you copied from Steam, then click Test and save.

data.name: SteamSetupSuccess
data.value: Connected. Found {0} games in your Steam library.

data.name: SteamSetupMissingFields
data.value: Enter your Steam API key and make sure your account was detected.

data.name: SteamSetupInvalidSteamId
data.value: The Steam ID does not look valid.

data.name: SteamSetupInvalidApiKey
data.value: Invalid API key. Check the key and try again.

data.name: SteamSetupConnectionFailed
data.value: Could not connect to Steam. Check your internet connection and try again.

data.name: SteamNotConfigured
data.value: Not connected. Set up Steam to see your full library.

data.name: SteamNotConfiguredInstalled
data.value: Steam detected but library not linked yet.

data.name: SteamSetupPrompt
data.value: · Set up Steam library in Settings

data.name: SteamApiKeyPromptIntro
data.value: Steam is installed, but you have not linked a Web API key yet. You can set one up now or continue with the automatic local library.

data.name: SteamApiKeyPromptWhy
data.value: It lets OpenGameHUB list your entire Steam library, including uninstalled games you have never opened on this PC, and sync playtime from your account.

data.name: SteamApiKeyPromptWithout
data.value: We will still read your local Steam library automatically: games Steam has synced on this PC, with playtime when available. You may miss owned games that were never downloaded or played here.

data.name: SteamApiDisconnected
data.value: Steam API key removed. The local library will be used on the next refresh.

data.name: EpicConnectedStatus
data.value: Epic account connected. Cloud library sync is enabled.

data.name: EpicConnectedStatusNamed
data.value: Epic account connected ({0}). Cloud library sync is enabled.

data.name: EpicNotConnectedStatus
data.value: Epic account not connected. Connect to list owned games that are not installed.

data.name: EpicAuthStarted
data.value: Epic sign-in opened. After completing it, refresh your library.

data.name: EpicDisconnected
data.value: Epic account disconnected. Refresh your library to remove cloud-only Epic games.

data.name: EpicLauncherNotInstalled
data.value: Epic Games Launcher is not installed on this PC.

data.name: EpicHelperUnavailable
data.value: Epic library helper could not be prepared. Check your internet connection and try again.

data.name: DevModeHelp
data.value: Reset platform connections and onboarding prompts for testing. Relaunch also clears the local library cache.

data.name: DevResetConnectionsDone
data.value: Connections reset. Refresh the library to replay onboarding prompts.

data.name: ShowGridCovers
data.value: Show cover art in game grid

data.name: ShowGridCoversHelp
data.value: Disable to save memory. Covers are still shown in the details panel when you select a game.

data.name: CoverArtHelp
data.value: Optional: IGDB or SteamGridDB can improve cover quality.

data.name: NoLaunchMethod
data.value: No launch method is available for this game.

data.name: CannotDetermineLaunch
data.value: Could not determine how to launch {0}.

data.name: LegendaryTimedOut
data.value: legendary took too long to respond
